channel.title: Heaps on Utsab's Digital Garden
channel.description: Recent content in Heaps on Utsab's Digital Garden

item.title: Heaps (Priority Queues) — Detailed Notes
item.description: Based on: Heaps Visually Explained (Priority Queues) Topic: Max Heap — structure, insertion, deletion, and building from an array 1. What is a Heap? A heap is a special complete binary tree that satisfies the heap property: Max Heap: Every parent node is greater than or equal to its children. The maximum element is always at the root. Min Heap: Every parent node is less than or equal to its children.
